items.name: Eyes of Everfrost
items.description: You know how in books, the hero is always described as having frosty blue eyes?

items.description: You went looking for treasure and came back wearing it. Jewel-encrusted eyes and an ice-blue lip for when subtle isn't on the map.

items.name: Supernova Eyes

items.name: Eyes of Everflame
items.description: The flames of 1000 years burn in his eyes.
